title: T4032QC Payroll Deductions Tables - Quebec - Effective January 1, 2026 - Canada.ca
content:
## T4032QC Payroll Deductions Tables - EI, and income tax deductions - Quebec - Effective January 1, 2026

## Notice to the reader
Publication T4032, Payroll Deductions Tables , is available in sections for each province and territory. Section A (available in both HTML and PDF formats) contains general information. Sections B and C (available in PDF format only) contain the payroll deductions tables for Employment Insurance premiums and the payroll deductions tables for federal tax deductions.
Please note that you can also use the Payroll Deductions Online Calculator (PDOC) to calculate federal tax deductions and employment insurance premiums.
- t4032qc-january-general-information.html [HTML]
- t4032-qc-1-26e.pdf [PDF]

### Section B - Employment Insurance premiums tables
- When the province of employment is Quebec [PDF]

### Section C - Federal tax deductions tables for Quebec
- 52 pay periods a year (Weekly) [PDF]
- 26 pay periods a year (Biweekly) [PDF]
- 24 pay periods a year (Semi-monthly) [PDF]
- 12 pay periods a year (Monthly) [PDF]
Last update: 2025-12-17
Related document: T4032 Payroll Deductions Tables
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.
